name: TTArtisan AF 35mm f1.8
description: Designed mirrorless cameras, the AF 35mm f/1.8 Lens from TTArtisan is a bright prime lens with a 52.5mm full-frame equivalent focal length. From this perspective, you can capture a wide range of subjects, including street scenes and portraits.

features.Key Features:: APS-C | f/1.8 to f/16 | 52.5mm (Full-Frame Equivalent) | STM Stepping AF Motor | One Extra-Low Dispersion Element | Two High Index Lens Elements | 9-Bladed Diaphragm | Minimum Focusing Distance: 2' | USB-C Interface for Firmware Upgrades
features.What's In The Box?: TTArtisan AF 35mm f/1.8 Lens | Front Lens Cap | Rear Lens Cap | Lens Hood
